serviceDetail.benefitsTitle: What will you achieve with this treatment?
serviceDetail.whyBody: At Allura we combine internationally certified specialists, 3D diagnostic technology and a care model designed especially for patients traveling from abroad. Your wellbeing begins before you arrive and continues long after you return.

nosotros.metaDesc: Discover the philosophy and team behind Allura Healthcare, excellence in medical tourism in Medellín.
nosotros.heroSubtitle: Allura is born from a passion for excellence in dentistry and aesthetic medicine, and from the pride of showing the best of Medellín to the world.
nosotros.missionBody1: At Allura we believe that health and enjoyment are not opposites. We are a specialized medical tourism destination in premium dentistry and facial aesthetic medicine, where each international patient receives world-class care backed by cutting-edge technology and the warmth of Medellín.
nosotros.missionBody2: Every person who comes to Allura doesn't just restore their smile or harmonize their face — they live a unique experience in one of the most vibrant cities in Latin America.
nosotros.pillarsSubtitle: Three principles that guide every decision we make with our patients.

pillars.title: Honest diagnosis
pillars.description: We evaluate each case without rushing, with 3D digital diagnosis and specialist opinion.

pillars.title: Personalized plan
pillars.description: We design an exclusive roadmap for you: treatment, accommodation and experience in Medellín.

pillars.title: Total support
pillars.description: We coordinate arrival, procedures, recovery and post-return follow-up from your home country.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: Every treatment follows the highest international standards, with certified specialists and cutting-edge technology.

values.title: Empathy
values.description: We listen and understand your story before any recommendation. Your wellbeing is our only priority.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: Clear information, real prices and ethical processes at all times. No surprises, no hidden commitments.

equipo.certificationsSubtitle: Our specialists have trained at the best institutions in Colombia, the Americas and Europe, and actively participate in international dentistry and facial medicine conferences.

serviciosPage.metaDesc: World-class premium dentistry and aesthetic facial medicine in Medellín for international patients.
serviciosPage.heroSubtitle: Premium dentistry and aesthetic facial medicine for international patients seeking real results.

categories.description: Comprehensive solution to restore function, stability and a smile that feels secure again. For patients who have lost teeth, have severe deterioration, or need complete rehabilitation, we design a comprehensive plan backed by 3D technology and top-level specialists.
Your smile, redesigned with artistic precision. We combine digital design, porcelain veneers and cutting-edge technology so each smile is unique, natural and projects exactly what you want to convey.

Bracket-free orthodontics with personalized digital planning and remote monitoring for international patients. We use Invisalign and next-generation aligners to achieve precise alignments with complete discretion.

Precision facial aesthetic medicine to enhance your features naturally. Our team of specialists works with minimally invasive techniques and international protocols for results that look authentic and lasting.

comoFunciona.metaDesc: Discover the step-by-step process for receiving world-class dental and medical care in Medellín with Allura Healthcare.
comoFunciona.heroSubtitle: A process designed to make your medical tourism experience transparent, safe and stress-free, from your home country to Medellín.

steps.title: Share your needs
steps.description: Complete our contact form with your health and wellbeing goals. The Allura team responds with personalized guidance in less than 24 hours, with no commitment.

steps.title: Virtual consultation with specialists
steps.description: Schedule a secure video call with Allura's certified doctors or dentists. You'll receive a preliminary diagnosis, treatment options and a clear quote before traveling.

steps.title: Medical plan and travel experience
steps.description: Our team designs your comprehensive plan: appointments, dates, recommended accommodations and optional activities in Medellín. All coordinated so your stay is comfortable and memorable.

steps.title: Procedure and full support
steps.description: We coordinate your arrival, clinical procedures, recovery and post-return follow-up from your home country. We're with you at every stage.

faqs.q: Do I need to speak Spanish to receive care?
faqs.a: No. We have bilingual coordinators (Spanish and English) available throughout the entire process.

faqs.q: What happens if I need follow-up after returning to my country?
faqs.a: We offer remote follow-up with video calls and direct communication with your specialist via WhatsApp.
Yes. All our treatments include guarantees according to the type of procedure, with clear follow-up protocols.

faqs.q: Can I combine several treatments in one trip?
faqs.a: Absolutely. In fact, many patients optimize their trip by combining dental and facial aesthetic medicine treatments.

comoFunciona.ctaTitle: Your first step is a conversation
comoFunciona.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your case with no commitment. Our team guides you for free.
